auth.heading:
Ready to remember
every word you learn?
auth.subtitle: Sign up to build your personalized word deck, save your progress, and more.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.emailAlreadyExists: This email address is already in use
auth.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to the
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

1.title: You keep pausing to look up words
1.body: Watching with subtitles, you constantly pause, look it up, take notes. It kills the joy — and you forget it after one look anyway. There is no need to ruin it this much!

2.title: Hi, I am Sublexify
2.body: I will help you learn English from the shows and films you love. The best words are hidden in your favorite scenes.

3.title: Familiarity is learning itself.
3.body: When you spot a word you once studied in the most thrilling scene of your favorite show — and you remember it — you will realize learning was never that hard!

4.title: You learn words, then forget them
4.body: It is not your fault. New words are hard to remember, especially if you only see them once. With exercises like these, you can reinforce these words whenever you want. Also, thanks to the algorithm we developed within the app, we will continue to remind you of even the words you learned in the past on a regular basis :)

5.title: Sublexify uses memory science to make words stick
5.body: We turn the words from your shows into flashcards and quizzes, and use spaced repetition until you master them.

6.title: Track your progress step by step
6.body: Monitor the words you've learned, practiced, and struggled with through detailed statistics. Keep your motivation high and reach your goals!

7.title: Start your adventure
7.body: Start now to learn English enjoyably with these features and countless more we couldn't fit here!
